title: Add SmearGate+BigramHash context-repair submission (1.2006 BPB, 15.0MB)
body:
## Summary

Non-record submission: dense 9-layer 512-dim GQA with SmearGate + BigramHash context features, MLP_MULT=3, int6+zstd export with fp16 embedding passthrough.

- **Post-export roundtrip exact:** 1.2006 BPB
- **Total artifact:** 14,999,691 bytes
- **Training:** 12,511 steps, 600s on 8xH100 SXM

Developed through AI agent coordination by a surgeon with no ML or software engineering background.

See `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-20_ContextRepair_SmearGate_BigramHash_SP1024_9x512_MLP3_int6zstd/README.md` for full details.
